new_metric.name: New Metric
new_metric.description: New metric used to test parameters: uses first numeric column in Test Dataset

params.label: Threshold
params.help: If computed value > threshold, return threshold; otherwise return computed value.

anonymity_set_size.name: Anonymity Set Size
anonymity_set_size.description: Computes anonymity set sizes for combinations of sensitive features (quasi-identifiers).

params.label: Sensitive features
params.help: Select one or more sensitive feature columns (e.g., sex, age).

k_anonymity.name: K-Anonymity
k_anonymity.description: Evaluates K-Anonymity over quasi-identifiers (each equivalence class must have at least k records).

params.label: k value
params.help: Minimum group size for k-anonymity compliance.

params.label: Quasi-identifiers
params.help: Columns used to form equivalence classes. If empty, falls back to the selected sensitive_features.

l_diversity.name: L-Diversity
l_diversity.description: Computes L-Diversity by grouping on quasi-identifiers and counting distinct values of a sensitive attribute.

params.label: Quasi-identifiers
params.help: Columns used to form groups. If empty, falls back to selected sensitive_features.

params.label: Sensitive attribute
params.help: Column name whose diversity within each group is measured.

params.label: l value
params.help: Minimum number of distinct sensitive values required in each equivalence class.

mutual_information.name: Mutual Information
mutual_information.description: Computes Mutual Information between each feature and a selected sensitive attribute.

params.label: Sensitive Attribute
params.help: Column used as target variable for Mutual Information computation.

params.label: Columns to Exclude
params.help: Columns excluded from MI computation (besides the sensitive attribute).

t_closeness.name: T-Closeness
t_closeness.description: Computes Wasserstein distance between global and group distributions of a sensitive attribute, grouped by quasi-identifiers.

params.label: Quasi-identifiers
params.help: Columns used to form groups. If empty, falls back to selected sensitive_features.

params.label: Sensitive attribute
params.help: Column whose distribution is compared globally vs within each group.
